title: pubilaria planifolia
intro: Pubilaria planifolia, also known as the Thai thimble flower or Thai tea tree, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pubilaria planifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusions, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and skincare products for its potential benefits in promoting skin health and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.
